assertionResults.fullName: edgeKey creates a comma-separated key from two vertex numbers
assertionResults.title: creates a comma-separated key from two vertex numbers

assertionResults.fullName: shortest_path_lengths returns an empty map when the graph has no vertices
assertionResults.title: returns an empty map when the graph has no vertices

assertionResults.fullName: shortest_path_lengths returns only the zero self-distance for a single vertex with no edges
assertionResults.title: returns only the zero self-distance for a single vertex with no edges

assertionResults.fullName: shortest_path_lengths sets diagonal distances to zero for graphs with multiple vertices and no edges
assertionResults.title: sets diagonal distances to zero for graphs with multiple vertices and no edges

assertionResults.fullName: shortest_path_lengths preserves direct edge lengths when they are already shortest
assertionResults.title: preserves direct edge lengths when they are already shortest

assertionResults.fullName: shortest_path_lengths computes a shorter indirect path through an intermediate vertex
assertionResults.title: computes a shorter indirect path through an intermediate vertex

assertionResults.fullName: shortest_path_lengths computes paths requiring multiple intermediate vertices
assertionResults.title: computes paths requiring multiple intermediate vertices

assertionResults.fullName: shortest_path_lengths keeps unreachable paths as positive infinity
assertionResults.title: keeps unreachable paths as positive infinity

assertionResults.fullName: shortest_path_lengths handles negative edge weights when there is no negative cycle
assertionResults.title: handles negative edge weights when there is no negative cycle
